response.justification: Strong individual contributor with 13+ years of software development experience and notable depth in testing, developer tooling (test runners, assertion libraries, CI setup), and a track record of teaching/workshops. However, the role requires 2+ years of formal people management and 3+ years of technical leadership, which are not evidenced in the resume — titles are IC-focused (Senior/Staff Software Developer) with no direct reports or team-lead responsibilities described. Mobile platform ecosystem experience is also thin (some iOS/Apple TV work years ago), and there's no demonstrated experience leading organizational change.
strengths: Deep developer-tools background: built Trial test runner, Fluent-Asserts, CI/CD infrastructure, and Selenium training programs
13+ years of polyglot engineering across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded with strong testing/TDD discipline
Proven knowledge-sharing ability through workshops, talks, and multi-module courses — transferable to team development
concerns: No explicit people management experience or direct reports mentioned in any role
Limited mobile-platform ecosystem depth (brief iOS/Apple TV stint in 2015–2016, nothing recent)
No evidence of setting roadmaps, leading organizational change, or managing performance cycles

key_factors.factor: Developer tools and testing infrastructure depth
